name: Kreditbanken A/S
summary: Kreditbanken A/S provides various banking products and services to private and business customers in Denmark. The company offers savings accounts; and loan, budget, pension, and investment products, as well as online and mobile banking services. It also provides payment cards and insurance products. Kreditbanken A/S was founded in 1926 and is based in Aabenraa, Denmark.
